zh.West Hall, High Legh, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭爾希 萊
zh.lifeSummary: 當Baron Hamon de Venables於1112年11月18日出生在英國爾希 萊時，他的父親Gilbert de Venables III, 3rd Baron of Kinderton-4歲，母親Baroness Margery de Hatton11109歲。他和Margery Hatton至少有1個兒子。他去世於1160年在英國英格蘭爾諾維其享年48歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Venables
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Venables (Eure), perhaps named with Late Latin venabulum ‘hunting ground’ (a derivative of venari ‘to hunt’).

variants.name: Venable
meanings: History: American bearers of this name are descended from Abraham Venables, who came to VA from England in or before 1687.

nameMeanings.name: Hamon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Baron Hamon de Venables was born on 18 November 1112, in High Legh, Cheshire, England, his father, Gilbert de Venables III, 3rd Baron of Kinderton, was -4 and his mother, Baroness Margery de Hatton, was 11109. He had at least 1 son with Margery Hatton. He died in 1160, in Northwich, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 48.

ko.lifeSummary: Baron Hamon de Venables(이)가 1112년 11월 18일 영국 체실르 히 레그h에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gilbert de Venables III, 3rd Baron of Kinderton(은)는 -4세였고, 그의 어머니 Baroness Margery de Hatton(은)는 11109세였다. 그는 Margery Hatton(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1160년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 노르스위치에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Baron Hamon de Venables родился 18 ноября 1112 г. в местности хаи лег, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Gilbert de Venables III, 3rd Baron of Kinderton было -4 год, а матери, которую звали Baroness Margery de Hatton, 11109. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Margery Hatton. Он умер в 1160 г. в местности нортвич, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 48 лет.
